name: Consequential Action Approved
description: A consequential action must be preceded by a passed, authenticated approval gate.
rationale: Capability gate: the approval gate must have been passed with an authenticated record before the consequential action. Conversational or implicit approval does not satisfy it.

examples.fails: Release with no prior authenticated approval gate

source: FIX AI WG — Proposal on Agentic AI Runtime Governance (Healey & Houston, 12 Jun 2026); governance conditions per Szpruch, Sudjianto, Bhatti & Ang (2026), 'Scalable Runtime Governance for Agentic AI in Financial Services'.
